title: JMI PhD Admission 2026 Important Dates

detail.title: JMI PhD Admission 2026 Important Dates
detail.short_info: JMI PhD Admission 2026-27 is open. Online application starts from 11 May 2026 to 08 June 2026. Check JMI PhD Entrance Exam Date, Application Fee, Admit Card and complete schedule

content.text: Jamia Millia Islamia (JMI) has released the official notification for Ph.D. Admission 2026-27. The online application process starts from 11 May 2026 and the last date to apply is 08 June 2026. The Ph.D. Admission Test will be conducted on 20 and 21 June 2026. Interested candidates can apply through the official JMI admission portal.
Direct Official Notification PDF: Click Here

rows: Availability of Online forms to Apply
Result Declaration of candidates called for interview
Research Proposal to be submitted to various Department/Centre
Interviews to be conducted before CRC/DRC
List of Selected candidates to be displayed
Commencement of Classes for Course Work

sections.heading: How to Apply for JMI PhD Admission 2026

items: Visit the official JMI admission portal: https://admission.jmi.ac.in
Register and fill the online application form.
Pay the application fee of Rs. 2000/-.
Submit the form and take a printout for future reference.
Final Merit List based on test + interview

sections.heading: JMI PhD Admission Test Exam Pattern

content.text: Note: Detailed subject-wise syllabus will be available on the official admission portal.
